member.name: M:MeterView.Channels.API.Controllers.v1.ChannelsController.GetChannel(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a single Channel by ID.

member.name: M:MeterView.Channels.API.Controllers.v1.ChannelsController.GetChannels(MeterView.Channels.API.Domain.Channels.Dtos.ChannelParametersDto)
member.summary: Gets a list of all Channels.

member.name: P:MeterView.Channels.API.Domain.Addresses.Address.Line1
member.summary: Address line 1 (e.g., street, PO Box, or company name).

member.name: P:MeterView.Channels.API.Domain.Addresses.Address.Line2
member.summary: Address line 2 (e.g., apartment, suite, unit, or building).

member.name: P:MeterView.Channels.API.Domain.Addresses.Address.City
member.summary: City, district, suburb, town, or village.

member.name: M:MeterView.Channels.API.Extensions.Services.WebAppServiceConfiguration.AddBoundaryServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Reflection.Assembly[])
member.summary: Registers all services in the assembly of the given interface.
